nasb.text: And they drew lots for them, and the lot fell to Matthias; and he was added to the eleven apostles.

esv.text: And they cast lots for them, and the lot fell on Matthias, and he was numbered with the eleven apostles.

cnv.text: 大家就為他們抽籤，結果抽中了馬提亞，他就與十一使徒同列。

ccb.text: 然后，他们抽签，抽中了马提亚，就把他列入十一使徒中。

csbs.text: 接着，他们为这两个人抽签，抽到了马提亚，他就与那十一个使徒同列。
